    meta:
        author = "CyberDudeBivash GOC — Sentinel APEX v39.0"
        description = "Detection for Advanced Flow will make Android sideloading safer"
        severity = "critical"
        date = "2026-03-23"
    strings:
                $actor = "UNC-CDB-99" ascii wide nocase
    condition:
        any of them
}

        any of them
}

executive_briefing.executive_summary: During the reporting period, the CYBERDUDEBIVASH Sentinel APEX platform processed 500 threat advisories. Of these, 98 are classified as CRITICAL risk and 43 as HIGH risk. 20 advisories involve vulnerabilities confirmed as actively exploited (CISA KEV). Primary threat actors include UNC-CDB-99, CDB-APT-22, CDB-APT-28. The overall threat posture requires IMMEDIATE executive attention with focus on patch management and detection rule deployment.
